message: UI fixes, terrain balance, and demand card improvements
Add configurable train speed tiers (Standard/Faster/Fastest)
Add configurable win conditions and clean up solo mode tests
Fix AI track wormholes and movement undercharge bugs
Add AI multiplayer lobby UI, remove solo mode and player count picker
Add AI player lobby management for multiplayer rooms
Add isAI flag as first-class player model property
Add bidirectional pathfinding to minimize AI build costs
Fix AI deploy and initial build to prioritize source city
Add lookahead building for AI when primary route is complete
Improve AI route selection, building, deployment, and movement
Improve AI demand selection and movement to reduce stalling
Add idle room cleanup sweep every 2 hours
Make lobby scrollable and cap room list to 5 visible rows
Fix solo game save/resume by excluding AI players from waiting room
Fix zoom-out hover twitching by caching container dimensions
Add resume lobby flow and save button UI (Save & Resume Phase 2)
Add server-side save/resume infrastructure (Phase 0 + Phase 1)
Add toggle to hide city goods icons on map
Add mountain pass corridors through Alps for traversable routes to Italy
